us_iran_war.hormuz_blockade: Iran still controlling Strait of Hormuz. ~1,500 ships stranded. Only ~3.24 tankers/day passing vs normal ~17/day.
us_iran_war.us_blockade: 20 US warships enforcing blockade on Iran (as of May 11, 2026). US Central Command turned back 52 vessels since Apr 13.
us_iran_war.latest_clashes: May 5: Iran launched missiles/drones at UAE. May 8: US struck 2 Iranian tankers near Hormuz.
us_iran_war.us_proposal: US sent new proposal on May 6 (Wednesday) proposing Iran reopen waterway and US end blockade over 1 month. Awaiting Iran response.
us_iran_war.china_role: Iran FM Araghchi visited Beijing May 6, met Wang Yi. China called for end to war and Hormuz reopening.
us_iran_war.us_missile_depletion: US high-end missile stocks down 25-50% after $25bn Epic Fury campaign (per Guardian).
us_iran_war.iran_economy: Rising inflation, unemployment, unpaid wages inside Iran.
us_iran_war.saudi_arabia: Saudis not consulted before launch of Operation Epic Fury - objections recorded (per Guardian).

russia_ukraine.victory_day: May 9: Scaled-down Victory Day parade. Putin expressed confidence in victory in Ukraine.
russia_ukraine.ceasefire: Putin declared 2-day ceasefire May 8-9 for Victory Day anniversary.
russia_ukraine.putin_signal: Putin says war 'coming to an end' (per multiple sources).
russia_ukraine.russian_strikes: Russian strikes killed 27 in Ukraine ahead of rival ceasefires (May 8).

israel_lebanon.status: Fragile ceasefire, 3rd round of talks next week in Washington
israel_lebanon.casualties: 2,715 killed, 8,353 injured in Lebanon since Mar 2 (Israeli strikes).
israel_lebanon.talks: Israel and Lebanon ambassadors to US to meet May 14-15 in Washington (3rd round).
israel_lebanon.hezbollah: Hezbollah targeted 2 Israeli settlements. Israel strikes in south Lebanon continue despite truce.

carrier_deployments.detail: 20 warships enforcing Iran blockade (The War Zone)

china_diplomacy.foreign_minister_presser: May 7 - FM Lin Jian regular press conference - pushed back on Japan militarism concerns.
